parameters: \n<Mimi>Hey hey heyyy! Welcome to Mimi's Pet Shop!
I know my customers... this is your first
\n<Mimi>Want one of these cuties all for yourself?
They're so so sooo adorable!! But besides
being cute, pets can help you in a lot
\n<Mimi>This is a pet shop, so you can buy buy buy yourself
a new best friend! This is your lucky day!
Extra line to fix bug with interpreter
but come on, she's so so so cute!!
\n<Mimi>Aw, it looks like he really likes you!
\n<Mimi>That one's Arlo! He was born deaf, but his exceptional
sense of smell grants him the ability to sniff out
nearby treasure! The perfect companion for the
adventurer who wants to find it all!
\n<Mimi>Are you interested in giving him a new home?
\n<Mimi>Yippee! He'll be the best friend you've ever had!
\n<Mimi>Well, he was bred to be a lapdog, of course he's expensive!
He has that royal blood coursing through him! But if you ever
change your mind, and no one else has picked him up, he'll be
\n<Mimi>Aw, that's Jackson... he's an old boy.
I can barely even take him for walks
anymore. It's sad when they age...
\n<Mimi>Haha, he's always trying to grab someone's food!
Didn't you see him staring at that empty bowl!
I literally just just just fed him...
\n<Mimi>That one's Duncan! He's a hungry lil' guy,
but he knows a thing or two about good food!
Just having him around will make all the
food you eat a lot lot lot better for you!
\n<Mimi>Are you interested in giving him a new home?
\n<Mimi>Yippee! Make sure you watch what he eats!
\n<Mimi>Yeah, but good hamsters are expensive! You don't
want to pay for one with some disease disease disease,
right? He's healthy as can be, and sure to live a long
life, so you won't lose your moeny money money!
\n<Mimi>That's Ol' Jimbo, he's been with me for a long time.
No one ever wanted him because he looks like a rat. Can you
see see see it? I don't know how much longer he has left...
